Tonic alterations:
Neapolitan (♭II)
♭III
Minor subdominant (iv)
♭VI
Subtonic (♭VII)
↓
Common out-of-key chord transitions:
Secondary dominant
Chromatic mediant (m3)
Chromatic mediant (M3)

Preferences
Select a virtual MIDI port to send chord notes to your DAW (IAC Driver on macOS, loopMIDI on Windows).
